title: Look up: Probing the vertical profile of new particle formation and growth in the planetary boundary layer with models and observations
author: O’Donnell, Samuel E and Akherati, Ali and He, Yicong and Hodshire, Anna L and Shilling, John E and Kuang, Chongai and Fast, Jerome D and Mei, Fan and Schobesberger, Siegfried and Thornton, Joel A and others
